title: NYC Health (DOHMH) — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Department of Health and Mental Hygiene object schemas. Reconciles the geography spine and address fields that recur across the DOHMH NYC Open Data datasets (restaurant inspections 43nn-pn8j, rodent inspection p937-wjvj, childcare inspections dsg6-ifza, indoor environmental complaints 9jgj-bmct) and the DOH transactional systems (ABC Eats, eVital, Accela Citizen Access).

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

GeoLocation.description: The shared NYC geography spine appended to most DOHMH Open Data rows: community board, council district, census tract, NTA, and the tax-lot identifiers BBL/BIN. Every field is nullable because coverage varies by dataset and by row.

Address.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (address.json#/$defs/Address); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Address still resolve.

Violation.description: A single cited violation on an inspection (restaurant, childcare, and similar inspection datasets are one-row-per-violation).

critical.description: Whether the violation is critical (derived from Open Data 'critical_flag').
